name: cc-script
description: cc-script — the product script of the cc-* harness: the ground -> diverge -> decide -> build pipeline. /roadmap-management captures the product's North Star and charts a roadmap; /what-to-do ranks where a product could go next; /how-to-do thinks one fork through to ONE decision; /do builds one task to a smoke-checked finish, then hands off to /refactor-review-test, which hardens it (behavior-preserving refactor, /code-review, full tests) and commits. Driven by cc-musician (the musician) and supervised by cc-conductor. Depends on cc-instruments (routes stuck fixes to its /slap).
